graphMain.indexStopped:
--------------------------
[System] Indexing has been stopped!
GraphRAG natively supports resumable indexing. When you restart the build next time, previously parsed and requested data chunks will hit the cache (.cache directory), saving significant time and cost.
--------------------------

--------------------------
[System] Stale build lock detected and forcefully released. You can now restart the build.
--------------------------

settings.title: System Settings

behavior.systemPromptDesc: Global prompt acts as the base instruction for AI nodes, determining their role and response style.
behavior.templatesDesc: Entity types extracted during graph building. You can assign domain-specific templates individually in the graph editor.
behavior.typesPlaceholder: Enter entity types separated by commas or newlines...

system.languageDesc: Change the interface language of the application.
system.docParseDesc: Select the underlying engine used to convert images and PDFs to Markdown.
system.concurrentTasksDesc: Controls the maximum number of parallel tasks for graph building and document parsing. Increasing this can improve processing speed but will consume more system resources.

localModels.title: Local Models Management
localModels.desc: Download and manage offline models. If a model is not installed, the app will automatically try to download it when needed.
localModels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the local cache for this model? This will free up disk space but you will need to re-download it next time.

funasr.name: FunASR Speech Recognition
funasr.desc: Used for offline transcription of audio and video to text, including VAD and punctuation restoration models.

mineru.name: MinerU Complex PDF Parsing
mineru.desc: Includes layout analysis and formula recognition models, suitable for PDFs with complex formulas and charts.

docling.name: Docling Document Parsing
docling.desc: The default recommended document parsing engine, based on RT-DETR architecture, fast with low footprint.

footer.savedAuto: Changes take effect immediately and are saved locally.

about.slogan: AI Knowledge Workbench — Visual Canvas × Knowledge Graph × Multi-modal Document Parsing
about.description: A desktop AI application for knowledge workers. Build your own knowledge analysis workflows by connecting data sources, prompts and AI outputs through a visual canvas.

editor.buildDesc: Manage documents to index in the left panel, then click the 'Start Index Build' button on the top right. AI will automatically analyze documents and extract the entity knowledge network.
editor.step1: Select and confirm the document combinations you want to connect from the knowledge base
editor.step2: Start the build process, wait for the system to perform semantic understanding and knowledge graph extraction
editor.step3: Explore insights in the visualization canvas, or perform global intelligent penetration search

ai.notFound: Could not find relevant information in the specified knowledge graph.
ai.noApiKey: AI API Key not configured, cannot perform proofreading. Please configure in settings.
ai.proofreadSystemPrompt:
You are a professional text proofreader. The following text is an auto-transcription from audio ASR, which may contain the following issues:
1. Homophone/near-homophone errors (common transcription errors due to accents).
3. Professional terminology recognition errors (especially proper nouns, open-source project names, technical terms, etc.).
4. Grammatical issues in colloquial expressions.
5. Number format unification: Convert all spelled-out numbers to Arabic numerals (e.g., "667"), but keep ordinal numbers.
6. Lack of logical paragraph division and formatting (usually squeezed into one big block).

Please proofread and correct the text strictly following these principles:
1. **Context-aware intelligent correction**: If you encounter phrases that sound similar but are obviously illogical in the current context, correct them to reasonable phrases.
2. Do not change the overall expression style and content meaning of the original text.
3. **Forced formatting and paragraphing**:
- Automatically break paragraphs based on semantic topic shifts.
- **When encountering obvious structured enumerations (like "First", "Second", "Next"), force a line break to make each item a separate paragraph.**
4. Keep the original Markdown formatting unchanged.

Directly output the fully proofread and beautifully formatted text, without any explanatory notes.
ai.documentTooLarge: The content of node "{{title}}" is too long ({{length}} characters), exceeding the maximum context length supported by the current AI model. Please try splitting the file, switching to a model with a larger context window, or reducing the number of connected data nodes.
ai.tableTooLarge: The content of table node "{{title}}" is too large ({{length}} characters), exceeding the maximum context length supported by the current AI model. Please try reducing the number of rows or columns, or switching to a model with a larger context window.
